backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages a persistent labels map with CRUD operations (initialize defaults, add, rename, delete, get, getAll), also including a blob storage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two features: removing fixed aspect ratio constraints from note image containers, and adding ImageUploadPicker to RoutinesPage, with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and notable changes across the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based color tokens for light and dark modes, applied to base elements like body and borders.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for MyOrganizer Pro PWA, loading two Google Fonts stylesheets (Inter/Poppins/Roboto/Open Sans and Montserrat/Lato/Nunito/etc.) and the React app root.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest for MyOrganizer Pro defining app name, display mode, theme colors, and two icon sizes (192x192 and 512x512).
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first with network fallback strategy for static assets, with install/activate lifecycle management and notification click handling.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component with tab-based navigation across Home, Streak, Quote, Routines, Notes, Records, and Settings pages, using lazy loading with Suspense for heavy pages.
frontend/src/components/common/ImageUplo: Dropdown menu component offering Camera, Gallery, and File upload options, with outside-click and Escape key dismissal behavior.
frontend/src/components/common/LoadingSp: Provides a spinning LoadingSpinner component and a PageSkeleton placeholder component used as Suspense fallbacks.
frontend/src/components/common/Modal.tsx: Reusable modal dialog component with configurable size, scroll lock, Escape key dismissal, focus management, and an optional title/close button header.
frontend/src/components/common/ToastCont: Renders a fixed-position stack of toast notifications (success, error, info) pulled from the toast store, each dismissible via an X button.
frontend/src/components/home/QuoteWidget: Displays a clickable home-screen widget showing the current daily quote with customizable font/color/alignment, or a placeholder prompt if none exists.
frontend/src/components/home/StreakWidge: Displays a clickable home-screen widget showing the user's current check-in streak count, last check-in time, and a 'Today' badge if already checked in.
frontend/src/components/home/TodayRoutin: Displays a clickable home-screen widget showing up to four items from today's routine profile (weekday/weekend), with formatted times and completion state.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Root layout shell that composes the desktop sidebar, scrollable main content area, and mobile bottom tab bar around the active page's children.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppSideba: Desktop-only sidebar with app logo, primary navigation buttons for all tabs, and a footer attribution link; highlights the active tab.
frontend/src/components/layout/BottomTab: Mobile-only fixed bottom navigation bar rendering icon+label buttons for each main tab, with active-state styling and a dot indicator.
frontend/src/components/notes/LabelManag: Modal dialog for creating, renaming, and deleting note labels, including a confirmation overlay before deletion and bulk reassignment of affected notes.
frontend/src/components/notes/MultiSelec: Fixed top toolbar shown during multi-note selection, providing Archive, Trash, and Export (TXT/DOC/JSON) actions for the selected notes.
frontend/src/components/notes/NoteCard.t: Renders a single note card with support for text, checklist, and image note types, including pin/archive/trash actions via a dropdown menu and a selection checkbox.
Full-screen modal for creating and editing notes with support for text, checklist, and image types, including color picking, label selection, speech recognition, reminders, and image upload.
frontend/src/components/notes/QuickAddBa: Collapsed input bar that expands to let users quickly create a new text, checklist, or image note.
frontend/src/components/streak/CheckInBu: Displays the current streak count and a check-in button that becomes a disabled confirmation state after the user checks in for the day.
frontend/src/components/streak/StreakCal: Monthly calendar component that highlights days the user checked in, with navigation between months.
frontend/src/db/db.ts: Instantiates and exports a singleton OrganizerDB object that exposes typed Table instances for all app data stores.
frontend/src/db/idb.ts: Lightweight native IndexedDB wrapper providing a Table class with add, put, get, delete, toArray, count, and clear operations, replacing Dexie.
frontend/src/db/schema.ts: TypeScript interfaces defining the data shapes for all IndexedDB stores: Note, RoutineProfile, Record, StreakData, QuoteData, Label, ImageBlob, and AppSettings.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageStorage.ts: Provides a hook with saveImage, getImageUrl, and deleteImage functions that persist image blobs (full and thumbnail) in an IndexedDB table via Dexie.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/clear functions and status flags via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useLabels.ts: Manages CRUD operations for labels stored in IndexedDB, including duplicate/reserved-name guards and optional note reassignment on deletion.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotes.ts: Manages notes stored in IndexedDB with support for filtering by view (all/archive/trash), search, and label, plus CRUD, pin, archive, trash, and restore operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching all labels and initializing default labels via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuote.ts: Manages a motivational quote stored in IndexedDB, supporting save and rotation (shuffle or daily) from a configured quote list.
frontend/src/hooks/useRecordImages.ts: Provides utility functions to compress, save, retrieve, and delete record image attachments stored as base64 data URLs in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useRecords.ts: Manages records stored in IndexedDB with search and date-range filtering, plus CRUD operations and JSON export functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useRoutines.ts: Custom React hook for managing weekday/weekend routine profiles stored in IndexedDB via Dexie, providing CRUD operations (add, update, delete, reorder) and toggle-complete functionality with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollLock.ts: Custom React hook that locks/unlocks body scroll by toggling CSS position/overflow styles and preserving the current scroll position when locked.
Custom React hook wrapping the Web Speech API to provide start/stop listening, final and interim transcript state, error handling, and a browser-support check.
frontend/src/hooks/useStreak.ts: Custom React hook that loads and manages a daily check-in streak from IndexedDB, incrementing or resetting the count based on consecutive days and showing toast feedback.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties (OKLCH color tokens) plus reusable component classes like note-card and masonry-grid.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with TanStack Query and an InternetIdentity authentication provider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page component displaying a live clock/date header, streak, quote, and today's routine widgets, plus a floating action button for quick note creation.
frontend/src/pages/NotesPage.tsx: Full-featured notes page with search, label filtering, multi-select, archive/trash views, note creation/editing via modal, and import/export functionality in TXT, DOC, and JSON formats.
frontend/src/pages/QuotePage.tsx: A settings/editor page for configuring a motivational quote widget, supporting font, color, alignment, blur, rotation mode, and a list of quotes with live preview and save functionality.
frontend/src/pages/RecordsPage.tsx: A full-featured records management page with add/edit/view/delete, search, date filtering, image attachments, speech recognition input, and import/export in TXT, DOC, and JSON formats.
frontend/src/pages/RoutinesPage.tsx: A routines management page supporting weekday/weekend/auto profiles, drag-and-drop ordering, image attachments, speech input, and import/export of routine items.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: App settings page for toggling theme, accent color, font family, background image, storage usage display, and full data export/import/clear operations.
frontend/src/pages/StreakPage.tsx: Displays the user's daily check-in streak with current count, total check-ins, last check-in time, a check-in button, and a calendar history view.
frontend/src/store/appStore.ts: Zustand store managing global app appearance state (theme, accent color, font) with helpers to persist and apply CSS variable changes to the document.
frontend/src/store/toastStore.ts: Zustand store for managing a queue of auto-dismissing toast notifications, with convenience functions for success, error, and info toasts.
frontend/src/utils/dataValidation.ts: Validates the structure of imported JSON data, checking for required arrays (notes, routines, records, labels) and returning a result with any errors.
frontend/src/utils/dateFormatter.ts: Exports a `formatDateTime` utility that converts a string, number, or Date into a human-readable '28 Feb 2026, 3:45 AM' format, handling edge cases like date-only strings and invalid input gracefully.
frontend/src/utils/imageCompression.ts: Provides `compressImage` and `generateThumbnail` functions that use an HTML canvas to resize and compress image files to JPEG blobs at configurable dimensions and quality.
frontend/src/utils/noteExport.ts: Exports notes (all or selected) to TXT, DOC, and JSON file formats by formatting note fields and triggering browser downloads with timestamped filenames.
frontend/src/utils/noteImport.ts: Parses and imports notes from JSON, TXT, and DOC files into the IndexedDB database, deduplicating IDs and mapping raw file content to the `Note` schema.
frontend/src/utils/notificationService.t: Provides helpers to request browser notification permission and schedule a one-shot `Notification` to fire at a specified future timestamp.
frontend/src/utils/recordExport.ts: Exports an array of `Record` objects to TXT, DOC, or JSON files, formatting titles, timestamps (via `formatDateTime`), and content before triggering browser downloads.
frontend/src/utils/routineExport.ts: Exports routine profiles and their items to TXT, DOC, or JSON files, formatting time values in 12-hour AM/PM and triggering browser downloads with timestamped filenames.
frontend/src/utils/routineImport.ts: Parses routine profiles from JSON, TXT, and DOC files and imports them into the database, mapping content to `RoutineProfile` and `RoutineItem` schema shapes with generated IDs.
frontend/src/utils/seedData.ts: Seeds the IndexedDB database with initial sample data for notes, records, streaks, quotes, and routines if each collection is empty. Provides a `seedDatabase` async function that checks counts before inserting defaults.
frontend/src/utils/serviceWorkerRegistra: Registers a service worker from `/sw.js` on page load if the browser supports it. Silently ignores registration failures so the app continues to work without a SW.
frontend/src/utils/storage.ts: Provides typed localStorage getters and setters for three small UI settings: theme (light/dark), accent color, and font family. Includes sensible defaults for each setting.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom font families, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, extended border radii, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 3) for MyOrganizer Pro, listing two pending fix requests: removing fixed aspect ratios from note images and adding an ImageUploadPicker to the RoutinesPage.
